zh.lifeSummary: 當John Livingston of Callendar於1346年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林時，他的父親William Livingston Laird of Drumry57歲，母親Christian Callendar29歲。他於1370年與Marjorie Menteith在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1402年登記服兵役。他去世於1402年9月14日在英國諾圖波藍德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Livingston of Callendar于1346年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林时，他的父亲William Livingston Laird of Drumry57岁，母亲Christian Callendar29岁。他于1370年与Marjorie Menteith在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1402年登记服兵役。他去世于1402年9月14日在英国諾圖波藍德享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Livingston of Callendar was born in 1346, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Livingston Laird of Drumry, was 57 and his mother, Christian Callendar, was 29. He married Marjorie Menteith in 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1402. He died on 14 September 1402, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Livingston of Callendar est né en 1346, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Livingston Laird of Drumry, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Christian Callendar, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Menteith en 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1402. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1402, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Livingston of Callendar 1346 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Livingston Laird of Drumry 57 und seine Mutter Christian Callendar 29. Er hat 1370 in Schottland, United Kingdom Marjorie Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1402 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. September 1402 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Livingston of Callendar è nato il nel 1346 nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Livingston Laird of Drumry, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Christian Callendar, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Menteith nel 1370, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1402. Morì il 14 settembre 1402, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Livingston of Callendarが1346年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで生まれた時，父William Livingston Laird of Drumryは57歳，母Christian Callendarは29歳であった。1370年にイギリススコットランドでMarjorie Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年に兵役登録をした。彼は1402年9月14日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Livingston of Callendar(이)가 1346년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Livingston Laird of Drumry(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Callendar(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Marjorie Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1402년 9월 14일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Livingston of Callendar nasceu em 1346, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Livingston Laird of Drumry, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Christian Callendar, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Menteith em 1370, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1402. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1402, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Livingston of Callendar родился в 1346 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Livingston Laird of Drumry было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Callendar, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Menteith в 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1402 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 сентября 1402 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Livingston of Callendar nació en 1346, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Livingston Laird of Drumry, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Christian Callendar, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Marjorie Menteith en 1370, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1402. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1402, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
